title: rosa lutetiana f. ramosissima
intro: Rosa lutetiana f. ramosissima, also known as the highly branched Wild Rose, is a fragrant, thorny shrub that belongs to the rose family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Rosa lutetiana f. ramosissima include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory issues.
